docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-26-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRESEDER, EVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVERANT, ALEX $2,865.79 PRINCIPAL, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,095.79, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIVERANT, ALEX
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $155.00) SERVED MAR-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIVERANT, ALEX

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF EVAN TRESEDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX LIVERANT IS PRESENT. CHECK GIVEN TO THE PLAINTIFF FROM THE DEFENDANT FOR $1095 IS RETURNED BACK TO THE DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TRESEDER, EVAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,950.00 FILED BY TRESEDER, EVAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIVERANT, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON *FINAL* REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. OTHER: THERE WILL BE NO MORE CONTINUANCES PER THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THERE WILL BE NO MORE CONTINUANCES.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVERANT, ALEX
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVERANT, ALEX
